stories.name: member-list-section
stories.title: Show member list with profile names in sidebar
stories.description: Add a Members section to GroupManager that displays all group members. Use getGroupMembers() to get hex pubkeys, fetch kind:0 metadata for profile names, fall back to shortenPubkey() format. Section only visible when a group is selected. Updates reactively when group state changes.

includes: Kind:0 profile name fetching and caching
Reactive updates on group state change

scenarios.name: Member list shows creator after group creation
steps: Verify Members section appears with 1 member

stories.notes: Single story since all requirements are tightly coupled — member list, profile resolution, and reactive updates are all part of the same component.
